title: tephrosia biflora
intro: Tephrosia biflora, also known as two-flowered tephrosia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Tephrosia biflora include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant is commonly used in traditional medicine, and its herbal preparations include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be prepared by boiling the leaves or roots in water or mixing them with other herbs to create a topical application.
